name: EAS Attestation Issuance
description: Issue an Ethereum Attestation Service (EAS) attestation. Agents can attest to facts about other addresses or themselves: 'I verified KYC on X', 'I held >0.1 ETH for 30 days', etc. Forms the reputation primitive layer.
use_case: Agent runs a verification service. For each user that passes a check, it issues an EAS attestation. Other agents read the attestation to gate access (e.g., 'only addresses with KYC-attestation from agent X can use my DEX').

verification.criteria: Tx target is EAS contract, function attest, attester == agent. New attestation UID emitted in Attested event.
